rules: Save slots must remain under terminal/saves/<tag>/.
Save slot entries may reference repo-cartridge, disk-cartridge, or drag-drop-cartridge mounts only.
Boards are excluded because Boards mode never uses terminal/saves/.
Save slot indexing does not imply repo mutation outside terminal/saves/.
Save slot selection supports reopening bounded runtime state, not editing source content.
guardrails: Save-slot indexing remains bounded to terminal/saves/.
Save-slot discovery does not turn saves into source-of-truth content.
Resume flows reopen runtime state without changing repo source files.
